overview.short: Bharatgad Fort is a fort located 18 km from Malvan, in Sindhudurg district, of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Bharatgad Fort is a fort located 18 km from Malvan, in Sindhudurg district, of Maharashtra. This fort is located on the southern bank of Gad river or Kalaval creek. The fort is spread over an area of 4-5 acres and covered with mango orchard.

topPlaces.name: Masure
topPlaces.description: Masure is a village located in Malvan taluka of Sindhudurg district, southernmost district of Maharashtra, India, across coastal line. It is around 480 km from Mumbai.

topPlaces.name: Bhagwantgad
topPlaces.description: Bhagwantgad Fort (Marathi: भगवंतगड किल्ला) is a fort located 18 km from Malvan, in Sindhudurg district, of Maharashtra. This fort is located on the northern bank of Gad river or Kalaval creek.

topPlaces.name: Aangnechi wadi
topPlaces.description: Anganewadi is a village located in the Sindhudurg district of Malvan, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Achra, India
topPlaces.description: Achra is a coastal village in the Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra, India.

topPlaces.name: Rewandi
topPlaces.description: Rewandi is a village in the Malvan taluka of Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra State, India. Revandi is other variation for the same name.

items.note: Masure is a village located in Malvan taluka of Sindhudurg district, southernmost district of Maharashtra, India, across coastal line. It is around 480 km from Mumbai.
Bhagwantgad Fort (Marathi: भगवंतगड किल्ला) is a fort located 18 km from Malvan, in Sindhudurg district, of Maharashtra. This fort is located on the northern bank of Gad river or Kalaval creek.
Anganewadi is a village located in the Sindhudurg district of Malvan, Maharashtra, India.
Achra is a coastal village in the Sindhudurg district, Maharashtra, India.
Rewandi is a village in the Malvan taluka of Sindhudurg district in Maharashtra State, India. Revandi is other variation for the same name.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bharatgad?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bharatgad is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Manohar International Airport, Mopa (North Goa) (62 km) and the nearest railway station is Vasco da Gama (Goa) (92 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bharatgad?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bharatgad at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bharatgad?
faq.a: Stays in Bharatgad start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bharatgad?
faq.a: The top attractions are Masure, Bhagwantgad, Aangnechi wadi, Achra, India, Rewandi.
